persona_name: Structural — Full Lifecycle CRUD Stress Test

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: All 14 lifecycle steps passed without a single failure. COALESCE partial update logic is correct — updating title preserves description and vice versa. Status transitions (PLANNING -> ACTIVE -> COMPLETED) preserve all fields. Cascade deletion correctly removes trip, bookings, and itinerary items. Share token lifecycle works correctly: sharing enables public access, unsharing returns 404. Booking ingestion parsed all flight details accurately (confirmation code, airline, airports, terminals, seat, passenger). AI created itinerary items proactively when asked in companion mode.
